title: Context Import Manifest
description: Canonical schema all providers normalize to before review. The parser writes this. The agent reads it, adds triage decisions, and the renderer reads the final form.

home_base.description: Absolute path to the user's home base, e.g. /agent/brain/users/kyra/

truncated.description: Set by parser when the source AI flagged the export as truncated. When true, the skill surfaces the continuation prompt and stops.

stats.description: Pre-triage counts produced by the parser.

deduped_items.description: Items that already existed in the user's brain and were skipped.

number.description: Sequential 1-based number used in the review HTML and in the user's approval grammar.

source_id.description: The id assigned by the source AI in its export.

source_confidence.description: Confidence assigned by the source AI.

source.description: Where in the source AI this came from.

attachments.description: Filenames bundled into the upload ZIP, if any.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 of the normalized content. Used for dedupe across imports.

triage.description: Filled in by the agent (not the parser) before rendering.

suggested_category.description: Agent's category recommendation (may differ from source AI's).

conflict.description: Set when the item disagrees with something already in the brain.

conflict_with.description: Absolute paths of existing files this item conflicts with.

reason.description: One-line agent justification for the suggested action.
